userText: I usually wear perfume when I need to attend party.
correctedText: I usually wear perfume when I need to attend a party.
generalAdvice: 你已经记住了 perfume 的核心意思，也能用在自然句子里。下一步只要稳住 attend a party 这种可数名词前的冠词。

issues.note: attend party 这里缺少冠词，通常说 attend a party。
issues.suggestion: 可数名词单数前先检查 a/an/the，比如 attend a party, join a class, buy a gift。
